name: BB:UBA : Detect Locky Using IP
notes: This building block looks for IP addresses in the UBA : IOCs-Locky IP reference set. Any known IP addresses related to Locky Ransomware should be added to this table.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Detect Locky Using IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when any of Source or Destination IP are contained in any of UBA : IOCs-Locky IP - IP
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Detect Locky Using IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of Source or Destination IP are contained in any of UBA : IOCs-Locky IP - IP
